4 | P a g e 
 
 
MATALIKO 
Kutalika kwiiya kubelesya ncotwaamba mucikuwa kuti ‘Competence Based Curriculum’ 
caleta kwiiya kucincide kwaluzyibo lwakucita zyiyandika kupa kuli basicikolo kubelesya 
zyakucita zyiyandika mazuba aciindi cino kwalo kwiiya nikwaunka mujulu, calo citondezya 
ntaamu yakucinca mukusumpula lwiiyo mucisi. 
Bbuku lyakubelesya kuyiisya kumataliko alwiiyo naa Modyu (Teaching Module) kuli 
basicikolo bali mu Foomu 1 muciiyo ca Litilicca, lyakalembwa kutobela muzeezo wa 
Competence Based Curriculum, walo uswaanganya lwiiyo olu azyintu zyicitika mubuumi 
bwini bwamuntu.  Zyintu zyeelede kucitwa, (General Competences) zyakabikkwa mubbuku 
lijisi zyalwiiyo mucisi lya 2023 Curriculum Framework, zyili swaanganinzyidwe abbuku eeli. 
Eeli bbuku lilaa muzeezo wakugwasyilizya bamayi bayiisya basicikolo ba Foomu 1 
mukuyiisya kubelesya Competence Based Curriculum, muciindi mabbuku aayelede 
kubelesyegwa naatana lembwa.  Eeci citondezya kulyaaba kuliko kuzwa kumutabi walwiiyo 
kutegwa caba cintu cuubauba kuli bamayi kuyiisya basicikolo.  Nokuba boobo bamayi 
balakulwaizyigwa kuzuzikizya bbuku eeli lyakubelesya kuyiisya kwiinda mabuvwuntauzi 
bwabo beni kutegwa bazuzikizye myaako iinga yajanika ciindi cakuyiisya. 
 
 
 
Joel Kamoko (Mr) 
Permanent Secretary – Educational Services 
MINISTRY OF EDUCATION

5 | P a g e 
 
KULUMBA 
Lwiiyo lwakutaanguna lwa Litilicca mu Foomu 1 nkuzwidilila kwakubuzyanya-buzyanya 
abasikutola lubazu banji mumutabi akunze aamutabi uulanganya lwiiyo mucisi. 
Bantu banji, zyikolo ambunga zyinji zyakabuzyigwa kutegwa zyaambe mbozyiyeeya 
kujatikizya kwiiya ciiyo ca Litilicca mu Chitonga kwiinda mukwiiya kwakucita zyintu naa 
Competence Based Curriculum.  Mutabi uulanganya lwiiyo uyanda kupa kulumba kuli baabo 
boonse bakotola lubazu kupa twaambo twalo twakagwasyilizya kutegwa bbuku eeli 
lyakubelesya kuyiisya ba Foomu 1 lilembwe. 
Kumamanino ndiyanda kulumba mbunga yababelesi babeleka ku Curriculum Development 
Centre, balo bunkutwe bwabo bwakabelesyegwa bweelede kubona masimpe kuti kulemba 
bbuku eeli kwamaninzyigwa bweelede. 
 
 
Charles K. Ndakala (Dr) 
Director Curriculum Development 
MINISTRY OF EDUCATION

9 | P a g e 
 
 
NTALISYO  
Bbuku lyakubelesya kugwasyilizya bamayi kuyiisya mu Foomu 1 naa Modyu (Teaching 
module) lyakalembwa kugwasyilizya bamayi kuyiisya bweelede ciiyo ca Litilicca mu Chitonga 
kubelesya nzila yakuyiisya mpya. 
Bbuku eeli lyakalembwa kutobelezya kuzuminanwa kwakacitika kwakubelesya kucita zyintu 
naa Competence Based Syllabus.  Muzeezo ngwakusola kubaa cakubelesya kuyiisya muciindi 
nokutana lembwa mabbuku aakubelesya akupa basikuyiisya zyakubelesya zyini, zyakucita 
alimwi akulingula kutobelezya basicikolo mpobateene alimwi anzyobayanda. 
Mutabi uulanganya lwiiyo mucisi ulizyi buyumu-yumu buboola kwiinda mukucinca nzila 
yalwiiyo kuya kuli imbi, yalo eeyi njakucikonzya kucita zyintu naa Competence Based 
mucikuwa.  Kusala nzila yakucizyiba kucita zyintu naa CBC nintaamu mpati yakucinca 
kusumpula lwiiyo luyandika.  Eeli bbuku litondezya kulyaaba kuliko kuzwa kumutabi 
ulanganya zyalwiiyo kutegwa cibe cintu cuubauba kuli bamayi, kutegwa bapegwa malailile, 
zyakucita zyiyeeyelwa, akulingula basicikolo kweendelanya amizeezo ya CBC. Nokuba 
boobo, bamayi balakulwaizyigwa kuzuzikizya bbuku eeli kwiinda mubuvwuntauzi bwabo beni 
kutegwa bazuzikizye myaako iinga yajanika ciindi cakuyiisya.   
Zyakucita zyapegwa akulingula kwapegwa mubbuku eeli zyiyandika kupa zyakucita zyini 
aluzyibo lwakuyeeyesya kuli basicikolo kumwi kacibapa kulimvwa bupati akucikonzya 
kucinca kutobela zyintu zyipya zyijatikizya kwiiya kucikolo.  Bamayi balakulwaizyigwa 
kubelesya lugwasyo lupegwa, kutobelezya zyintu nzyobacita mumakkilasi aabo, kutegwa 
kabakonzya kubelesya nzila zyimbi, zyizuminika kuti kwayandika.  Ooku kucikonzya 
kucincauzya boobu ncitu cipati kukucita kuti basicikolo boonse, kufwumbwa nkobabede, 
batambule bubotu kuzwa kulwiiyo lubelesyegwa. 
Kuyeeyelwa kuti bbuku eeli ciyakuba cibelesyo cipati kuli bamayi ciindi nobabelesya 
zyakucita zyeelede naa Competence Based Curriculum, kusumpula kucikonzya kupa lwiiyo 
lweelede, luzyibo akubikkila maanu ayandika kusola kuleta nzila yalwiiyo iisumpukide.

10 | P a g e 
 
BBUKU EELI MBOLYEELEDE KUBELESYEGWA 
Eeli bbuku lyakubelesya kuyiisya naa modyu (Teaching Module) lijisi zyakuyiisya zyeelede 
kuyiisyigwa kuli ba Foomu1.  Lilibikkidwe mumitwe yakubelesya.  Zyakwiiya zyili 
mubbuku eeli tazyili zyiiyo, pele inga zyabelesyegwa kubamba zyiiyo. Mwiiyi weelede 
kubelesya mitwe yatwaambo iili mubbuku eeli kuyiisya basicikolo.  
Kuli nzila zyiyeeyelwa kuti inga zyabelesyegwa kuyiisya Litilicca mu Chitonga. Eezyi nzila 
inga mwazyijana kumatalikilo aasilabbasi ya Litilicca.

MUTWE: MATALIKILO AA LITILICCA. 
NTALISYO 
Ciiyo eeci cilanganya bupanduluzi bwa Matalikilo aa Litilicca. Mumilaka yesu iina 
Afulika, tujisi misyobo mipati yobilo ya Litilicca yalo iili nja kumulomo alimwi 
ailembedwe.  
CIKWELELEZYA KUCIIYO: Ino nikwanyina zyakuswiilizya akweebela buumi 
nibwali buti? 
           MABALA MAPATI-PATI. 
• Kusansulula 
• Kusalangunya 
•  Kunongaula 
• Mazyalane. 
MUTWE MUSYOONTO: Kupandulula Litilicca. 
NTALISYO.  
Mucibeela eeci tulalanganya bupanduluzi bwa Litilicca. Tulamvwa bupanduluzi buzwa 
kubalembi baimpene-impene twamana tulabulanganya bupanduluzi oobu akubusalangunya 
kuti akati kabupanduluzi oobo bwapegwa, mbubuli mbotuyeeya kuti bulizulide kweendelanya 
amusyobo waciiyo ncotupandulula. Kumamanino aumwi sicikolo uleelede kubamba 
bupanduluzi bwakwe kweendelanya ambwaacimvwa ciiyo.  
CEELEDE KUCITWA: Kupandulula Litilicca. 
CAKUCITA 1: Kundandamika bupanduluzi bwa Litilicca bwiindene-indene. 
MWIIYI 
• Sololela basicikolo kundandamika bupanduluzi bwa Litilicca. 
• Gwasyilizya basicikolo kubambulula bupanduluzi mbubapa.

13 | P a g e

• Bandandamike bupanduluzi bwa Litilicca. 
 
LUZYIBO KUMWIIYI. 
Bupanduluzi bwa Litilicca 
• Litilicca yiitwa kuti nzyamumabbuku. 
• Caamba milimo yamizeezo yabantu iibikkidwe mubulembo. Eeci cilajatikizya 
mabbuku, zyaano, zyiimbo, milaso azyimwi biyo. 
•  Caamba kuzubulula buumi mumabala akasimpe mabotu.  
• Caamba zyintu zyilembedwe.  
•  Ninzila yakubwezelela, kuyobola akupa luzyibo akulikkomaninsya kuzwa kuzyalane 
lyomwe kuya kuli limbi.  
•  Ilajatikizya bulembo buzubulula zyilengwa Leza mbozyiswaangana 
amaumi aabantu kweendelanya amulembi mbucakamujata mubuumi 
bwakwe.  
•  Iimimina 
kutondezya 
kulimvwa 
kwabantu 
muzyooko 
mobakkala 
kumfwulumende, muzyintu zyibazingulukide, kubantunyina akuliyooyo 
wakabalenga walo uutalibonyi. 
•  Tacaambi biyo zyintu zyilembedwe zyilikke pele azyeezyo zyaambaulwa amulomo, 
zyitondezyegwa abantu, nzyobabamba kufwumbwa mumusyobo mozyibede.

14 | P a g e 
 
MWIIYI 
• 
 Sololela basicikolo kuti basansulule bupanduluzi bomwe-bomwe bwapegwa kweendelanya 
ambubacimvwa.  
• 
Gwasyilizya basicikolo kubambulula busansuluzi mbubapa bwa Litilicca. 
 
BASICIKOLO 
• 
Basansulule bupanduluzi bwa Litilicca bwapegwa. 
LUZYIBO KU MWIIYI. 
• Litilicca yiitwa kuti nzyamumabbuku. Eezyi zyitegwa nzyamumabbuku akaambo 
kakuti cibeela eeci cakali kujatikizya biyo kuyiisya akusunka zyakalembedwe 
mumabbuku aakalembwa abalembi baandeene- andeene. 
• Litilicca caamba milimo yamumizeezo yabantu iibikkidwe mubulembo. Eeci 
cilajatikizya mabbuku, zyaano, milaso azyimwi biyo. Kweendelanya abupanduluzi 
oobu, Litilicca cijatikizya mizeezo yabantu kufwumbwa mbwiibede pele kaibikkidwe 
mubulembo. Mizeezo eeyi inga kaili muciimo ca zyaano, zyisobano, zyeemo azyimwi 
biyo. 
• Litilicca caamba kuzubulula buumi mumabala aakasimpe mabotu. Mbulembo 
bwamizeezo yamuntu, mbwalimvwa, nzyalombozya kuti kazyili mbubo. Ncaano 
cabuumi bwamuntu cibikkidwe mubulembo akwaabanwa kubuleya. 
• Litilicca caamba zyintu zyilembedwe. Eeli bbala lijatikizya kapati milimo 
yamumizeezo yamuntu kwiinda mukweema amilaso, yalo mulembi njalemba 
akutondezya bubotu bujanwa muli njiyo buyiisya akukkomaninsya. 
• Litilicca ninzila yakubwezelela, kuyobola akupa luzyibo akulikkomaninsya kuzwa 
kuzyalane lyomwe kuya kuli limbi. Eeci cilijisi mulimo mubukkale, mizeezo, mumuya, 
mutunzanyu amumaumi aabantu. Oobu bupanduluzi butondezya kuti zyintu zyiyandika 
kapati muzyooko mukkala bantu zyilayiisyigwa kumazyalane mbwaayabuccililana. 
Alimwi zyijisi mulimo mupati kucenjezya akunyona bantu mbuli basololi bazyisi. Inga 
kazyilembedwe mumabbuku nokuba kwaambwa kwiinda muzyaano nokuba 
zyisobano.

mbulembo biyo, bwalo bubalwa kujatikizya mbuli mulembi mbwaswaanganya buumi 
bwabantu azyilengwa-Leza.

zyitondezyegwa

16 | P a g e

MUTWE MUSYOONTO 2: Kusalangunya bupanduluzi bwiindene-indene bwa Litilicca. 
NTALISYO: Litilicca ilijisi bupanduluzi bwaandeene-andeene kweendelanya abalembi mbobacimvwa ciiyo 
eeci.  Mucibeela eeci tulalanganya bupanduluzi bwaandeene bwa Litilicca kweendelanya ambubwapegwa 
muciiyo cainda. Tulalanganya kuti, mbubuli buzulide kweendelanya azyintu zyiyiigwa muciiyo eeci.  
CEELEDE KUCITWA: Kusalangunya bupanduluzi bwa Litilicca bwaandeene-andeene. 
CAKUCITA 1: Kulanganya-langanya bupanduluzi bwa Litilicca. 
 
 
 
MWIIYI

Kopa basicikolo bupanduluzi bwiindene-indene bwa Litilicca akubulanga-langa kuti mbubuli buzulide 
kabotu. Banongaule bomwe-bomwe akujana mapenzi abubotu muli mbubo bwalo bupa kuti 
kabutazulide nokuba kuzulila. 
• 
Gwasyilizya basicikolo ciindi nobanongaula bupanduluzi bwa Litilicca bwaandeene-andeene. 
BASICIKOLO 
• 
 Batondezye bupanduluzi mbobayeeya kuti mbobubo bweelela ncobeni kweendelanya azyiyiigwa 
muciiyo. 
LUZYIBO KU MWIIYI. 
• 
Bayi babelesye bupanduluzi buli muli cakucita 2. 
ZYIBELESYO ZYAKUYIISIZYA ZYIMWI. 
• 
Bbuku lyakubelesya kuyiisya, manila, cipepa cilembedwe bupanduluzi bwa Litilicca, amabbuku 
aamwi biyo. 
• 
Bayi balaangulukide kubelesya zyibelesyo kufwumbwa zyeendelana aciiyo. 
CILANGILWA CEELEDE: Bupanduluzi bwa Litilicca bwalangwa-langwa buzulide. 
MULIMO. 
• 
Basicikolo balembe bupanduluzi bwabo kuzwa kuli bwapegwa 
• 
Bayi bape mulimo kweendelanya aciiyo. 
CAKUCITA 2: Kukozyanyanyisya akupa lwiindano luliko akati kabupanduluzi bwapegwa.

17 | P a g e 
 
MWIIYI 
• 
 Sololela basicikolo kulanganya kukozyanya alwiindano luliko akati kabupanduluzi bwapegwa. 
 
 
BASICIKOLO 
• 
Balanganye bupanduluzi bwapegwa akutondezya boobo bujisi zyintu zyikozyanya aboobo 
bwiimpene kuli bumwi abumwi. 
LUZYIBO KUMWIIYI. 
• 
Bayi babelesye bupanduluzi buli muli cakucita 1. 
MULIMO 
1. Basicikolo basale bupanduluzi bwapegwa, bamana balembe kukozyanya nkobatijane muli mbubo.

(yakumulomo ailembedwe) 
NTALISYO 
Mucibeela eeci, tulalanganya matalikilo aamilimo ya Litilicca mutunsiya-nsiya mbuli nyimbo, 
twaambyo, zyaano azyimwi mbozyibeleka mumaumi aabantu. Tulalanganya milimo 
yantunsiya-nsiya mubuponi bwabantu, zyibelesyo (ngoma, tweembe, namalwa…) 
mbozyibelesyegwa mumilimo ya Litilicca mutunsiya-nsiya. Kutondezya mbuli milimo ya

Litilicca mutunsiya-nsiya kwiinda muzyiimbo, twaambyo, zyaano azyimwi mbozyizubulula 
luzyibo lwabukkale bwakaindi. 
CEELEDE KUCITWA. 
• Kubandika milimo ya Litilicca mutunsiya-nsiya. 
MWIIYI. 
• Sololela basicikolo kupa bupanduluzi bwamilimo yatunsiya-nsiya (zyiimbo, 
twaambyo, zyeemo …). 
• Ambila basicikolo kuti balanganye milimo ya Litilicca mutunsiya-nsiya. (Bamwi 
twaambyo, bamwi zyeemo, bamwi nyimbo azyimwi). 
BASICIKOLO. 
• Baimbe, beeme, baambe twaambyo … 
• Bayi bape mulimo kweendelanya aciiyo. 
CAKUCITA 1: Tondezya milimo ya Litilicca. 
Mbubonya mbuli mbotwamvwa kale atala aawa, kubelesegwa jwi lyamulomo kucibeela ca 
Litilicca eeyi pele kaijisi beebelezya naa baswiilizya. 
Oobu bulembo bujisi tunsiya-nsiya twabusongo mbulembo bwamilimo yalo eeyo 
ilaabupampu, busongo naa bulemu bulaatunsiya-nsiya. Mikozyanyo imwi kunze kwayeeyo 
yaambwa atala yabulembo bujisi tunsiya-nsiya twa busongo njeeyi; mabbuku, zyeemo, zyaano 
zyisobano azyimwi biyo. 
Ncintu ciyandisi kapati kuzyiba muciimo bulembo oobu mbobubede mbuli buponi, tunsiya-
nsiya naa zyakaindi. Eeci cijatikizya ciindi mulimo ulanganizyigwa nowakacitika, tunsiya-
nsiya tuzungulukide mulimo ooyo, nzyotusyoma, kubusena nkocakacitikila, nzyobacita bantu 
kubusena ooko kujana cakulya amakani atunzanyu aciindi aawo.  Naa waciteelela eeci, 
ulakonzya kuba abupanduluzi buzwide alimwi buzuunyene kujatikizya mulimo ngolanganya. 
Milimo ya Litilicca isiminide mutunsiya-nsiya. Kuvwuntauzya mboibede inga yapa 
kweezyeezya kuli kabotu kujatikizya mulembi naa mwaambi ncaamba, ciindi a zyizumizidwe 
kweendelanya aciindi mbuli zitobela; ciindi ncocakacitika a cakapa kuti mulembi naa mwiimbi 
aanze mulimo wakwe, tunsiya nsiya twakakulwaizya mulimo kuti waanzwe a musemo. Buponi 
kweendelanya abantu mbobapona mbuli bacete a bavwubi, milimo ibelekwa a bamakaintu a

47 | P a g e 
 
milimo ibelekwa a ba maalumi kuti naa ilaabuyambukizi nzi kweendelanya azyibeela naa 
lubazu ndobajisi bantu, azyimwi zyinji zyataambwa waawa.  
Cayandika kuziba kuti eeyi milimo ilaabuyambukizi bupati kumaumi abantu alimwi ciindi 
milimo eeyi noicitwa, zyibelesyo zyiindene-indene mbuli ngoma, tulumbu, miyuwa, 
banamalwa, tubiya, tunkobela azimwi zyataambwa waawa zyilakonzya kubelesegwa.  
Atulanganye mikozyanyo imwi yabulembo naa milimo abubotu mboijisi.  
a. Nyimbo  
Nyimbo nzyiyandisi kapati mumaumi abantu alimwi zyilabeleka munzila 
nzyotutayeeyeli. Nyimbo zyilakanana kumyuuya yabantu. Zyilakonzya kubelesegwa 
mumadilwe kuumbulizya balila. Zyoona nyimbo zyilabelesegwa kulumbaizya Leza 
naa bantu bacita zyintu zyibotu. Nyimbo alimwi zyilabelesegwa mukulikkomanisya, 
mumicado a mumapobwe.  
Nzyoonya nyimbo zyilabelesegwa akwiita mizimo kumalende amumwi munzila 
zyataambwa waawa. 
B. Twaambyo 
  Twaambyo milimo imwi yabusongo ijisi bupanduluzi busisidwe. Twaambyo ntuyandisi 
kapati nkaambo tulaamulimo wakusindinganya caambwa naa ciimbwa munzila zyaandeene. 
Tulabesegwa mumasena aandeene mbuli mubuleli, muzikombelo amumwi. Atulanganye 
kaambyo katobela; ‘Matako aali bubili taabuli kucumbana.’ Aaka kaambyo takaambi matako 
kwaagama.  Kabelesegwa biyo mbuli cibelesyo kutegwa basindinganye caambwa. Aaka 
kaambyo kalakonzya kubelesegwa mubusololi kuleta luumuno akati kabantu bazwangana. 
Mboona mbuli matako mbwaacumbana nkaambo akkede antoomwe, abantu bakkalaamwi 
balacumbana pele ooku kucumbana takweelede kubaandaanya pe mboona mbuli matako 
mbwaataandaani acumbana. Twaambyo ntoona tulakonzya kubelesegwa mukuyiisya, kulaya, 
kucenjezya, kukulwaizya kubelekela antoomwe anzila zyimbi zyataambwa waawa.  
C. Zyaano 
Zyaano ncibeela cimwi ca milimo ya Litilicca cakali naa cileta bantu antoomwe.  Zyaano zyili 
muzyibeela zyandeene-andeene pele zyoonse zyilaa zyiiyo zyiyiigwa. Kaindi bana bakali 
kukkala antoomwe masiku bamana kulalila abamanyinakulu naa bamasyaanyinakulu 
kwaaninwa zyaano zyandeene- andeene. Zyaano zilaanwa kuzwa kumusela omwe kuya

kumusela umbi. Zyilayiisya kapati kujatikizya maumi abukkale bwabantu mumasena 
mobakkala. Tulakonzya kubelesya zibelesyo mbuli bantu naa banyama ciindi nokwaanwa. 
D. Kweema 
    Ooyu ngoumwi wa yeeyo milimo ya Litilicca ilaabukwelelezi kapati   alimwi ilakanana 
kabotu kabotu mumizeezo yesu. Kuli zyeemo zyaandeene-andeene kweendelanya a capa kuti 
umwi muntu aanze ceemo eeco.  Mbubona mbuli nyimbo, kuli zyeemo zyakulumbaizya, 
zyabuumba, zyakutongooka a zyimwi.  Ooyu mulimo ulakwelelezya bantu nkaambo ulaleta 
mabunga-mabunga abantu antoomwe ciindi balaazyeemo nobeema. 
• Kuli aimwi milimo ya Litilicca mbuli mabbuku, zyiyeekezyo, milaso, zyaano 
zyabuumi, zyisobano azyimwi.

LUZYIBO KUMWIIYI 
a. Twaano 
Mukozyanyo: 
Mumunzi mwa Choobe kwakali kukkala munene wakali kutegwa Chaatila, ooyu 
munene wakalijisi mpuwo kapati akaambo kakuti wakali musongo kapati. Chaatila 
wakali kusyomwa kulaya bantu akupatulula twaambo twakali kunga tulipatide. 
Bumwi buzuba mukubusi umwi wazyina lya Muzembo wakayeeya kuti akasunke 
busongo bwamunene Chaatila. Wakabweza kayuni akukavwunga mumaanza. 
Naakasika kumunene wakati, “Omunene ndilizyi kuti ulimusongo kapati alimwi 
ulagwasya bantu banji baboola kusongolwa kutwaambo tunjaanji. Oomu mujanza 
ndifwumbatide kayuni, ino koya ndaambile, sena kayuni aaka kalalanga naa 
kalifwide?’ 
Munene Chaatila wakamulanga mwana mukubusi akumwetamweta biyo. Wakati 
“Muzembo kwiingula kukaambo kako aako nkuubauba, buumi bwakayuni aako buli 
mumaanza ako”. Muzembo wakali kuti munene uciya kumbele ani walo wakamaninzya 
kwaamba.

55 | P a g e 
 
Naakabona kuti munene waleka kubandika, Muzembo wakabuzya kuti ino kwaamba 
kuti “buumi bwakayuni buli mumaanza angu caamba nzi?” 
Munene Chaatila wakamusandulwida kuti, “Kuti nindaamba kuti kalalanga, 
nookajaya, alimwi kuti nindaamba kuti kalifwide nookalekezya kutegwa undizule.” 
Muzembo wakatyompwa kapati alimwi wakazumina ncobeni sikale ncaakati, ‘Mupati 
usiigwa kulubilo, kumaano tomusiyi.’
